texto: Let us hope that the advent of a successful flying machine, now only dimly foreseen and nevertheless thought to be possible, will bring nothing but good into the world; that it shall abridge distance, make all parts of the globe accessible, bring men into closer relation with each other, advance civilization, and hasten the promised era in which there shall be nothing but peace and goodwill among all men.
explicacao: Citação de Octave Chanute sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Let us hope that the advent of a successful flying machine, now only dimly foreseen and neverthel…” articula sucesso, civilization, flying em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como flying e good.
